name: afya-ya-akili-mcp
description: MCP server for Kenya mental health resources — therapist finder, crisis lines, teletherapy, workplace wellness, stigma reduction. 5 tools. 1st world equivalent: BetterHelp / Mind UK.

tools.name: mental_health_provider_finder
tools.description: Find licensed mental health practitioners in Kenya

tools.name: crisis_line_directory
tools.description: Kenya mental health crisis lines and emergency resources

tools.name: mental_health_rights
tools.description: Mental health rights under Kenya Mental Health Act 2022

tools.name: workplace_wellness_guide
tools.description: Kenya workplace mental health policies and EAP programs

tools.name: self_help_resources
tools.description: Kenya mental health self-help resources and support groups
